topic: Cross-validate the 5-phase XCE adoption implementation plans (001-005) inside .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/027-xce-research-based-refinement/. Find implementation risks, schema gaps, cross-phase integration concerns, edge cases, and alternative approaches NOT surfaced in the first deepseek-v4-pro research pass. Produce per-phase amendment proposals in pt-02/sub-packet-amendments.md. Each iteration focuses on one of 10 implementation-RQs (IRQ1-IRQ10) targeting deterministic-output edge cases (IRQ1), cross-language CONTAINS edge population (IRQ2), risk-formula weight validation (IRQ3), confidence-edge-case stress (IRQ4), subprocess reliability (IRQ5), cross-phase integration contracts (IRQ6), TESTED_BY edge ground-truth (IRQ7), code_packages necessity escalation (IRQ8), LLM-enrichment dispatch shape (IRQ9), and phasing-order optimization (IRQ10). Every claim must cite file:line in the 5 phase spec.md files OR mcp_server/code_graph/lib OR mcp_server/skill_advisor/lib. Cross-validation pass: have a different model (gpt-5.5 vs deepseek-v4-pro) re-examine the implementation plans to find gaps the first AI missed.

researchQuestions.label: Phase 001 HLD/LLD determinism + edge cases
researchQuestions.summary: Empty file, 1000-symbol file, missing docstrings, mixed-language files. Does generateHLD() actually produce identical output across 100 calls on identical db state?

researchQuestions.label: Phase 002 CONTAINS edge cross-language
researchQuestions.summary: TS-only or all langs? Verify via code_graph_query on multi-language fixture. Phase 002's chain depends on CONTAINS being populated.

researchQuestions.label: Phase 003 risk-formula weight validation
researchQuestions.summary: Are 0.35/0.25/0.25/0.15 weights defensible? Sensitivity test on 5-task labeled fixture. Alternative formulas?

researchQuestions.label: Phase 004 confidence-edge-case stress
researchQuestions.summary: Brief shape at confidence ∈ {0.79, 0.80, 0.81}. What if uncertainty > confidence? render.ts:124-133 gating edge cases.

researchQuestions.label: Phase 005 subprocess reliability
researchQuestions.summary: 12-20 tasks × 2 conditions = 24-40 sequential subprocesses. Resource leakage? cli-opencode 097 fix sufficient?

researchQuestions.label: Cross-phase integration contract
researchQuestions.summary: Phase 002 imports Phase 001 classifyFileRole. JSON contract + drift surfaces. Where could the contract break?

researchQuestions.label: TESTED_BY edge ground-truth
researchQuestions.summary: Is structural-indexer.ts actually emitting TESTED_BY edges? If not, Phase 003 untestedFlag is broken.

researchQuestions.label: code_packages necessity escalation
researchQuestions.summary: When does fq_name splitting fail vs P0 schema migration required? Phase 002 P1 REQ-007 marks code_packages as optional.

researchQuestions.label: LLM-enrichment dispatch shape
researchQuestions.summary: Phase 003 enrichWithLLM=true. Local-first via cli-opencode? SaaS dependency leak prevention.

researchQuestions.label: Phasing-order optimization
researchQuestions.summary: Recommended order 004 → 001 → {002,003} parallel → 005. Hidden coupling? Does 003 actually need 001's HLD layer info?

notes: 2nd-pass cross-validation deep-research run via cli-codex + gpt-5.5 + reasoning_effort=high + service_tier=fast (per memory feedback_codex_cli_fast_mode: -c service_tier=fast must be explicit).
Phase children dirs (001-005) are READ-ONLY during this run. Amendments are PROPOSALS in pt-02/sub-packet-amendments.md, NOT auto-applied.
10 IRQs designed to be implementation-focused (what could go wrong) rather than design-focused (what to adopt). The first pass (deepseek-v4-pro) covered design; this pass covers feasibility.
Verdict diversity floor adapted from pass-1 ADOPT/DEFER/SKIP to BLOCKING/CONFIRMED/NO-CHANGE-NEEDED for implementation risks.
State packet location follows deep-research SKILL §3 flat-first / pt-NN rule: prior 027/research/ flat exists from pass 1, so pt-02/ allocated as sibling subfolder.
